title: New dimension!
description: This is the new and great gid dimension mod to create a fun but new dimension for you to explore!I will try to update it!
body:
This adds a masive biom with cool textures and it adds a crazy dimension with mobs there that are ready to fight so get your armor and gear up cause were gana have some battles!
so first to make the portal ignigtor you need to get amethist and slime block with the amethist at the bottom and two slime blocks above then you need to make a nether portal except use gidstone and light it with the ignightor.
